ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country (e.g., US, JP, DE) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country (e.g., North America, Asia, Europe) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the statistical test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistical test (e.g., parametric, non-parametric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "country_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first country in the comparison */,
  "country_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second country in the comparison */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical test used */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score of the comparison */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the comparison */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the comparison */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_country_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_a_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_country_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_b_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES statistical_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the interval belongs to */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of the confidence interval (e.g., normal, empirical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_intervals_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the comparison */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the comparison was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the assignment belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the assignment is for */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the entry belongs to */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score of the comparison at the time of update */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the comparison at the time of update */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the comparison at the time of update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the comparison was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_history_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the entry belongs to */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical test used */,
  "country_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first country in the comparison */,
  "country_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second country in the comparison */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the comparison was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_metadata_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the trail belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken on the comparison (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the visualization setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the source belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)
